# pangolin_idp (Resource)

Manages idps.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `auth_url` (String) IDP auth URL.
- `client_id` (String) IDP client ID.
- `client_secret` (String) IDP client Secret.
- `identifier_path` (String) IDP identifier Path.
- `name` (String) The name of the idp.
- `scopes` (String) IDP identifier Path.
- `token_url` (String) IDP token URL.

### Optional

- `auto_provision` (Boolean) Wether to create users or not.
- `default_org_mapping` (String)
- `default_role_mapping` (String)
- `email_path` (String) IDP email Path.
- `name_path` (String) IDP name Path.
- `tags` (String) IDP identifier Path.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The ID of the idp.
